'''鈭歨-y-j''' ('''kahayaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pelt|pelt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pelt|pelt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-y-j
|-
! Lemma
| kahayaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihayaj|thihayaj]] || [[word:jihayaj|jihayaj]] || [[word:shihayaj|shihayaj]] || [[word:kihayaj|kihayaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhayaj|thuthuhayaj]] || [[word:jujuhayaj|jujuhayaj]] || [[word:shushuhayaj|shushuhayaj]] || [[word:kukuhayaj|kukuhayaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhayaj|thuhayaj]] || [[word:juhayaj|juhayaj]] || [[word:shuhayaj|shuhayaj]] || [[word:kuhayaj|kuhayaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhayaj|thuhayaj]] || [[word:juhayaj|juhayaj]] || [[word:shuhayaj|shuhayaj]] || [[word:kuhayaj|kuhayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehayaj|thehayaj]] || [[word:jehayaj|jehayaj]] || [[word:shehayaj|shehayaj]] || [[word:kehayaj|kehayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohayaj|thothohayaj]] || [[word:jojohayaj|jojohayaj]] || [[word:shoshohayaj|shoshohayaj]] || [[word:kokohayaj|kokohayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohayaj|thohayaj]] || [[word:johayaj|johayaj]] || [[word:shohayaj|shohayaj]] || [[word:kohayaj|kohayaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohayaj|thohayaj]] || [[word:johayaj|johayaj]] || [[word:shohayaj|shohayaj]] || [[word:kohayaj|kohayaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]] || [[word:hayaj|hayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hayaj|th忙hayaj]] || [[word:j忙hayaj|j忙hayaj]] || [[word:sh忙hayaj|sh忙hayaj]] || [[word:k忙hayaj|k忙hayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahayaj|thathahayaj]] || [[word:jajahayaj|jajahayaj]] || [[word:shashahayaj|shashahayaj]] || [[word:kakahayaj|kakahayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahayaj|thahayaj]] || [[word:jahayaj|jahayaj]] || [[word:shahayaj|shahayaj]] || [[word:kahayaj|kahayaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahayaj|thahayaj]] || [[word:jahayaj|jahayaj]] || [[word:shahayaj|shahayaj]] || [[word:kahayaj|kahayaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahayaj|shahayaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahayaj|goshahayaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahayaj|gokishahayaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahayajn眉|shahayajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahayajnkn眉|goshahayajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayajn眉|gokishahayajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahayajsh毛|shahayajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahayajnksh毛|goshahayajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahayajsh毛|gokishahayajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayajro|shahayajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayajnkro|goshahayajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayajro|gokishahayajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayajmu|shahayajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayajnkmu|goshahayajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayajmu|gokishahayajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahayajsher|shahayajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahayajnksher|goshahayajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahayajsher|gokishahayajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahayajng|shahayajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahayajnkng|goshahayajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahayajng|gokishahayajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahayajya|shahayajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahayajnkya|goshahayajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahayajya|gokishahayajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahayajyam|shahayajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahayajnkyam|goshahayajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahayajyam|gokishahayajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahayajn眉sh毛|shahayajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahayajnkn眉sh毛|goshahayajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahayajn眉sh毛|gokishahayajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayajn眉ro|shahayajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayajnkn眉ro|goshahayajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayajn眉ro|gokishahayajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayajn眉mu|shahayajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayajnkn眉mu|goshahayajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayajn眉mu|gokishahayajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahayajsh毛n眉|shahayajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahayajnksh毛n眉|goshahayajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayajsh毛n眉|gokishahayajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayajsh毛ro|shahayajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayajnksh毛ro|goshahayajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayajsh毛ro|gokishahayajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayajsh毛mu|shahayajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayajnksh毛mu|goshahayajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayajsh毛mu|gokishahayajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahayajron眉|shahayajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahayajnkron眉|goshahayajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayajron眉|gokishahayajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahayajrosh毛|shahayajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahayajnkrosh毛|goshahayajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahayajrosh毛|gokishahayajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahayajromu|shahayajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahayajnkromu|goshahayajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahayajromu|gokishahayajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahayajmun眉|shahayajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahayajnkmun眉|goshahayajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahayajmun眉|gokishahayajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahayajmush毛|shahayajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahayajnkmush毛|goshahayajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahayajmush毛|gokishahayajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahayajmuro|shahayajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahayajnkmuro|goshahayajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahayajmuro|gokishahayajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
